measures.name: count
measures.comment: Represents the total number of rows in the dataset. Use this measure to count all

measures.name: total_orders
measures.expr: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN order_id IS NOT NULL THEN order_id END)

measures.name: delivered_orders
measures.expr: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN shipment_status_after = 'DELIVERED' THEN order_id END)

measures.name: activated_orders
measures.expr: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN activation_status_after = 'ACTIVATED' THEN order_id END)

measures.name: failed_activation_orders
measures.expr: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN activation_status_after = 'FAILED' THEN order_id END)

measures.name: inventory_inflow
measures.expr: SUM(CASE WHEN inventory_delta > 0 THEN inventory_delta ELSE 0 END)

measures.name: inventory_outflow
measures.expr: SUM(CASE WHEN inventory_delta < 0 THEN ABS(inventory_delta) ELSE 0 END)

measures.name: returns_count
measures.expr: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN reverse_status_after IS NOT NULL THEN rma_id END)

measures.name: scrap_count
measures.expr: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN reverse_status_after = 'SCRAPPED' THEN rma_id END)

measures.name: restock_count
measures.expr: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN reverse_status_after = 'RESTOCKED' THEN rma_id END)

measures.name: refurbish_count
measures.expr: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN reverse_status_after = 'REFURBISHED' THEN rma_id END)

measures.name: delivery_rate_base
measures.expr: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN shipment_status_after = 'DELIVERED' THEN order_id END)

measures.name: activation_rate_base
measures.expr: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN activation_status_after = 'ACTIVATED' THEN order_id END)

datasets.name: warehouse_geo_map
queryLines:
WITH warehouse_coords AS (
  SELECT
    'WH_NORTH_DL' as warehouse_id,
    'Delhi' as city,
    28.667784763838412 as latitude,
    77.1947796517478 as longitude
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'WH_NORTH_CH',
    'Chandigarh',
    30.737271020662025,
    76.77929208730173
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'DC_NORTH_UP',
    'Lucknow',
    26.857785118472638,
    80.94112038258145
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'WH_WEST_MH',
    'Mumbai',
    18.968483809144722,
    72.82958055376464
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'WH_WEST_GJ',
    'Ahmedabad',
    23.030900721843018,
    72.57491637092005
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'DC_WEST_RJ',
    'Jaipur',
    26.923691209787727,
    75.78847884359011
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'WH_SOUTH_KA',
    'Bangalore',
    12.977878329705598,
    77.58553638021783
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'DC_SOUTH_TN',
    'Chennai',
    13.096811032909338,
    80.27176015010905
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'DC_SOUTH_TG',
    'Hyderabad',
    17.414246263323484,
    78.47874956004502
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'DC_SOUTH_KL',
    'Kochi',
    9.937130498790493,
    76.2705133411387
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'WH_EAST_WB',
    'Kolkata',
    22.57884319157552,
    88.36279734145604
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'DC_EAST_JH',
    'Ranchi',
    23.34816164480468,
    85.3137534890413
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'DC_EAST_OD',
    'Bhubaneswar',
    20.29501063920177,
    85.83073272626491
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'DC_CENTRAL_MP',
    'Bhopal',
    23.266836639220994,
    77.41617144898406
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'DC_CENTRAL_MH',
    'Pune',
    18.53410971818849,
    73.88147001369336
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'WH_NORTHEAST_AS',
    'Guwahati',
    26.11644624155923,
    91.71110344554376
),
warehouse_metrics AS (
  SELECT
    warehouse_id,
    region,
    COUNT(*) as total_events,
    AVG(delay_days) as avg_delay_days,
    SUM(is_delayed) as delayed_shipments,
    SUM(
      CASE
        WHEN revenue_leakage_flag = 1 THEN 1
        ELSE 0
      END
    ) as leakage_count
  FROM
    default.jio_supply_chain
  WHERE
    warehouse_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY
    warehouse_id,
    region
)
SELECT
  wc.warehouse_id,
  wc.city,
  wc.latitude,
  wc.longitude,
  wm.region,
  wm.total_events,
  wm.avg_delay_days,
  wm.delayed_shipments,
  wm.leakage_count
FROM
  warehouse_coords wc
    INNER JOIN warehouse_metrics wm
      ON wc.warehouse_id = wm.warehouse_id

lines:
## Section 1: Demand & Product Movement

*Identifies demand concentration and SKU velocity patterns*

## Section 2: Inventory & Operations

*Identifies inventory instability and operational inefficiencies*

## Section 3: Order & Delivery Performance

*Identifies fulfillment breakdowns and logistics inefficiencies*

## Section 4: Financial & Diagnostic Layer

*Identifies where money is lost and why - the critical decision layer*
